status: CLOSED 2026-05-11. Sprint complete. Track L 4 PRs (#45 backend logout, #51 frontend logout, #50 account password, #49 deploy guide) + Track S 4 PRs (#52 sidebar gating, #53 settings shell, #54 accounts admin, #55 org coords/leader) all merged into main. 2 Codex review fix-ups absorbed.
head_summary: Merge pull request #55 from ykylee/claude/work_26_05_11-s4 (final sprint PR)

decisions_made.summary: backend handles Hydra /admin/oauth2/auth/requests/logout/accept + Hydra /oauth2/revoke; frontend calls Kratos /self-service/logout/browser then /self-service/logout?token=...
decisions_made.rationale: Kratos session cookie is held by browser; frontend direct call is the standard. Backend logout audit + Kratos webhook covers audit.

decisions_made.summary: frontend calls Kratos public settings flow (browser -> optional re-auth -> POST settings) directly. No backend proxy.
decisions_made.rationale: Kratos settings flow is session-cookie based. Backend proxy adds cookie pass-through complexity for marginal audit gain. Audit deferred to Kratos webhook follow-up.

decisions_made.summary: /admin stays as Sys Admin Dashboard (infra topology). /admin/settings/{users,organization,permissions} is new. Sidebar exposes 'Sys Admin' group with Dashboard + Settings, system_admin only.
decisions_made.rationale: Minimal route migration cost. Maps cleanly to redesign concept terms (Sys Admin Dashboard + Sys Admin Settings).

prs.subject: backend POST /api/v1/auth/logout (Hydra accept + revoke; Kratos none)
frontend /auth/logout + Header rewire + Kratos browser logout
/account password change via Kratos public settings flow (no backend)
Sidebar gating + role-based default landing + Sys Admin group split
user admin actions wired to backend (issue/reset/disable/delete via Kratos admin)
prs.fix_up: P1 deactivated status + P2 empty body

prs.subject: org chart coords persistence + leader change

login_done: tokenStore + pkce + apiClient auto Authorization header
login_missing: Header Sign Out actually revoking Hydra + Kratos sessions
/account password change real implementation (account.service.ts is mock)

system_admin_state./organization: 4 tabs guarded by useStore.role==System Admin (client store), menu still visible to all
system_admin_state.org_admin_actions: OrgUnits CRUD wired; coordinate persistence + leader change pending
